description.value:
Frequency once per day

You've studied ancient kasathan martial techniques of using a combatant's own bodyweight against them to gain the upper hand in battle.

You [[/act grapple skill=acrobatics]] a target, using Acrobatics against the target's Fortitude DC instead of Athletics. You can continue to use Acrobatics instead of Athletics for further attempts to Grapple the target until they @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Escape] or are otherwise freed from being grappled by you.
